title: Can a retiree claim tax credit on spouse’s fixed deposit? TDS rules explained
summary: Since the interest earned on the deposit is subject to the clubbing provisions, it is not treated as the spouse’s taxable income. Therefore, they are not eligible to furnish the Form 121 declaration.

title: Debt funds bought before or after 1 April 2023: Know how the tax treatment changes
summary: For debt funds purchased before April 2023, long-term capital gains apply after 24 months and are taxed at 12.5%, while STCG are taxed as per the income slab. For investments made on or after 1 April 2023, all gains are taxed as per the investor's income tax slab. &nbsp;
